scripts.build: pnpm --filter @quickspense/domain build && pnpm --filter @quickspense/web build && pnpm --filter @quickspense/worker build
scripts.db:migrate:local: pnpm --filter @quickspense/web exec wrangler d1 migrations apply quickspense-db --local --persist-to=../../.wrangler
scripts.db:migrate:remote: pnpm --filter @quickspense/web exec wrangler d1 migrations apply quickspense-db --remote
